---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a feature for Smara
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**What problem does this solve?**
A clear description of the problem. Ex: "I'm always frustrated when..."

**What's your proposed solution?**
How you'd like it to work.

**Which tools do you use Smara with?**
- [ ] Claude Code
- [ ] Cursor
- [ ] Windsurf
- [ ] Codex
- [ ] VS Code
- [ ] Custom MCP client
- [ ] REST API directly
- [ ] Other: ___

**Anything else?**
Screenshots, links, or context.
